notes: v0.2.11: Heavy metal distortion. Two-stage architecture: pre-HPF (120 Hz) → tanh soft clip (Stage 1) → inter-stage HPF → HARD CLIP (Stage 2) → cabinet LPF (5 kHz). Modeled on real metal pedals (Boss HM-2, Metal Zone, Mesa Rectifier). Hard clipping in Stage 2 produces square-wave-like harmonics for the 'razor' metal character that single-stage tanh can't reach. Drive 1-3 = subtle overdrive, 5-10 = heavy rock crunch, 15-30 = full metal sustain. Loudness still drive-independent.
